---
name: Debugging Test Failure
about: Report a model that failed one of our diagnostic tests
title: '[FAILURE] [Test Name] - [Model Name]'
labels: bug
---

## Description
Which diagnostic test failed? (e.g., llm-debugger-1.md)

## Model Used
Which LLM provider/model were you testing?

## Expected Result
What did the test expect?

## Actual Result
What did the model actually output?

## Reproduction Steps
Provide a snippet of your API call (excluding sensitive keys).
